calendar.matters:
Petition To Preserve Evidence
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michelle Magarell, Esq. 650-989-5400 of Clapp Moroney for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RECOLOGY, INC.'s Petition To Preserve Evidence.

Recology, Inc.'s unopposed petition to preserve evidence is GRANTED for good cause shown. The court will execute the order proposed by Recology.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
